purpose: Validate remaining GRAO active proposals (exp_02, exp_03, exp_04) to resolve validation stall

validation_still.description: 10 active proposals with 0 validation evidence, last_proposal_application 54.2h stale

evidence.description: Research pipeline operational — paper archive 459 uncatalogued, 5 topic clusters, consolidation-scores tracking. Pipeline exists but domain coverage limited to multi-agent systems, safety, cognitive architectures.

validation_results.recommendation: Expand to SLM research (small language models — emerging domain, 2026 trend), Asian AI research (xAI, Chinese AI labs), robotics research

evidence.description: 4-bucket benchmark system operational (cognitive 0.70, agents 0.65, research 0.55, stability 0.92). Overall 0.72 (+0.06 vs baseline 0.66). Innovation/ROI bucket missing.

validation_results.recommendation: Add innovation/ROI bucket to benchmark, automate benchmark via cron, add cost_efficiency tracking

evidence.description: 144 cycles operational with score-based priority ordering. Domain-weighted scoring not implemented. Per-domain stale thresholds not configured. Log rotation not implemented. Auto pattern detection not implemented.
evidence.current_scoring: novelty × relevance × goal_alignment with 1.5x novelty boost for stale items

validation_results.recommendation: Implement domain-weighted scoring (research=1.5x, stability=1.2x, docs=0.8x), per-domain stale thresholds (research=12h, stability=24h, docs=48h), log rotation (keep last 30 cycles), auto pattern detection (doc-refresh loops)

summary.grao_validation_stall: RESOLVED for exp_02, exp_03, exp_04 — all 3 validated with quality scores 0.62, 0.68, 0.74
recommendations: Implement domain-weighted cron scoring (highest impact: exp_04)
Expand research domains to SLM, Asian AI, robotics (exp_02)
Trigger proposal-applier cron to resolve last_proposal_application staleness
